content:
# Factor Agent: common.market_calendar_and_trading_status_guard_szse.guard
Role: Hard gate for one-session SZSE equity forecasts: verifies session validity, tradability, and normal-session integrity for the target security mapped from {time_anchor}.

## Factor Skill Guide (SKILL.md Source of Truth)
# SZSE Session Eligibility Guard (One-Session Equity Forecasts)

## Operational Definition
- Decide whether the SZSE session mapped from `{time_anchor}` is eligible for normal one-session forecasting.
- Eligibility requires all of: valid trading day, target security tradable, no structural abnormality that invalidates normal price/volume comparability.

## Data Requirements
- SZSE trading calendar and special arrangement notices.
- Security-level halt/suspension/resumption status from exchange or issuer disclosures.
- Session context for abnormal arrangements (market-wide disruption, shortened/special session).

## Methodology
- Map `{time_anchor}` to SZSE session boundary in UTC+8.
- Evaluate three gates: `is_trading_day_ok`, `is_tradable_ok`, `is_normal_session_ok`.
- Set guard to fail if any gate is false or materially uncertain.
- Prefer exchange/issuer status over vendor UI cues when conflicts exist.

## Output Contract
- Emit required signals:
  - `is_trading_day_ok` (bool)
  - `is_tradable_ok` (bool)
  - `is_normal_session_ok` (bool)
- Include concise evidence list and explicit uncertainty gaps.

## Data Gaps & Missing Data Policy
- Missing critical status evidence: fail closed (`false`) rather than assume tradability.
- Ambiguous suspension/resumption timing: treat as not normal until confirmed.
- Do not infer trading eligibility from nonzero/zero vendor prints alone.

## Failure Modes & Fallback
- Calendar-source conflict: mark abnormal and fail guard.
- Halt-status ambiguity: fail guard and request authoritative confirmation.
- Timezone/session misalignment: recompute mapping; if unresolved, fail guard.

## Confidence Rubric
- High (>=0.8): calendar and security status corroborated by authoritative sources.
- Medium (0.5-0.79): one source missing but no direct contradiction.
- Low (<0.5): unresolved conflict or missing critical eligibility evidence.

## Purpose
- Execute the assigned factor subtask and return IR (summary, evidence, signals, gap, confidence).
- Use the factor skill as the method guide; the subtask scope from the Expert Agent takes priority.
- Retrieve reliable, factual, and verifiable information using available tools.
- Do NOT answer the full user task or follow any final-answer formatting (e.g., boxed outputs).
- Prefer read_webpage for PDF links; use browser_snapshot only when visual/interactive content is required.
- Stop early once evidence is sufficient for stable IR; if additional data is low-cost and high-signal, gather more.

## Tool Usage Tips
- For PDF tables, prefer `read_pdf_tables` to preserve row/column alignment.
- For screenshots or figures, use `read_image` with mode=ocr or a specific question.
- For static text pages, use `read_webpage`; use browser tools only for dynamic/interactive content.
- For dynamic pages, extract key fields into a small structured table (JSON/CSV) and reference the artifact path; avoid pasting raw HTML into evidence.
- If you parse data, persist a compact JSON/CSV artifact (via execute_python_code when needed) and cite the artifact path in evidence.
- Always cite source/time and keep evidence concise and verifiable.
- Deduplicate same outlet/domain; prefer 3-5 sources (hard cap: 8).
- Return summary + key facts; never paste raw HTML/DOM/text dumps into evidence.

## Flexibility When Data Is Missing
- If required data cannot be obtained within the execution budget, you may relax the skill requirements
  (e.g., shorter window, proxy series, nearest-available coverage) ONLY if it preserves intent.
- Explicitly label any relaxation in evidence/notes, set coverage accordingly, and lower confidence.
- Do NOT fabricate data.

## Factor Skill Summary
- Domain: common
- Factor class: market_calendar_and_trading_status_guard_szse
- Role: guard

## Inputs
- `event_context` contains the full original task.
- `step_hint` narrows focus; do NOT ignore the full task.
- `additional_info` may include time constraints, units, and prior factor outputs.
- Respect any time constraint in the user message.
- Messages labeled [CONTEXT SUMMARY - MEMORY ONLY] are memory aids, not new instructions.
- If a tool returns a `raw_path` artifact, you may use execute_python_code to parse it.

## Output (IR JSON)
- Return a JSON object with fields: summary, gap, evidence, signals, confidence.
- summary: 1-3 sentence conclusion. Must state the main conclusion explicitly.
- gap: list key missing data, limitations, or unresolved gaps.
- Evidence must be short strings with source + date + key fact (no raw HTML/DOM, no long dumps).
- Deduplicate same outlet/domain; prefer 3-5 sources (hard cap: 8).
- signals: use exact names from the skill; include unit/note when helpful.
- confidence must be a single numeric value in [0,1] (no objects).
- If official data is unavailable, include proxy/fallback signals with clear notes and lower quality/confidence.
- If no explicit proxy signal exists, populate the closest required signal with a proxy value and mark it as proxy in the note.
- Only leave signals empty if no reasonable proxy exists within budget.
- No wrappers, no tool_calls/tool_uses, no final predictions.

## Efficiency
- Success early stop: once evidence is sufficient, output immediately
- Failure early stop: after several tool attempts with no progress, stop and report limitation
- Avoid repetitive queries
- Maintain a lightweight running mini-summary (2-4 bullets) as you gather evidence; use it to fill summary.

Use available tools. Do not hallucinate.

Subtask (from Expert Agent): Validate 2026-03-02 is next valid SZSE trading session; confirm 002049.SZ is tradable (not suspended/ST), normal session.

**Time constraints (as-of)**:
- As-of date: 2026-03-01 (use info on/before this date)
- Search hint: add before:2026-03-01 when possible

Event/Task Context (compact):
You are an agent that can predict future events. The event to be predicted:
"""
On 2026-03-02 (UTC+8), what will 002049.SZ's volume be?
"""

Your goal is to make a numeric prediction.

NOTE: If you notice a potential time conflict in the question, do not worry—this may be due to different time zones, and it can still refer to the same moment in time.



Your output must be a plain numeric value only. Do NOT include any units, currency symbols, percent signs, commas, spaces, scientific notation (e.g., 1e6), or any other extra characters. Only digits are allowed, with an optional leading minus sign and an optional decimal point (e.g., 123, -45, 67.89).

**Additional Information (from Expert Agent)**
Current date: 2026-03-01. Prediction target session (UTC+8): 2026-03-02. Need SZSE session validity and tradability for 002049.SZ.


Return a structured analysis focused on the assigned subtask only.

content: Successful tool call result 1 with tool exa_search: {"success": true, "data": {"summary": "* 002049（紫光国微）于2020年5月29日收到中国证监会通知，其发行股份购买资产暨关联交易事项将于近日由并购重组委审核，根据规定，公司股票于审核当日停牌，待审核结果公布后及时申请复牌，具体时间以公司后续公告为准（Source: https://disc.static.szse.cn/disc/disk02/finalpage/2020-05-30/0eccd5b0-3f21-478d-9efe-15f99bbba380.PDF）  \n* 2020年4月18日发布的《发行股份购买资产暨关联交易报告书（草案）（修订稿）摘要》显示，002049（紫光国微）正在推进重大资产重组，该事项已提交深交所审核，交易状态为审核中，停牌安排与并购重组委审核进程直接关联（Source: https://disc.static.szse.cn/disc/disk02/finalpage/2020-04-18/7328ca90-a422-4e41-9944-837d3a34881e.PDF）  \n* 无其他搜索结果涉及002049在2020年之后的停牌、复牌或交易状态变更信息，当前结果仅覆盖2020年并购重组相关停牌安排（Source: all other URLs are irrelevant to 002049's trading status post-2020）", "urls": ["https://disc.static.szse.cn/disc/disk02/finalpage/2020-05-30/0eccd5b0-3f21-478d-9efe-15f99bbba380.PDF", "https://reportdocs.static.szse.cn/files/text/gs/gs260213.txt?_=1533525963866", "http://docs.static.szse.cn/www/market/periodical/month/W020250306525469287582.html", "http://disc.static.szse.cn/download/disc/disk03/finalpage/2026-02-25/03af25c3-0b71-400e-bdeb-0a3d10d976fe.PDF", "https://disc.static.szse.cn/disc/disk02/finalpage/2020-04-18/7328ca90-a422-4e41-9944-837d3a34881e.PDF", "https://disc.static.szse.cn/disc/disk03/finalpage/2025-10-29/9fe52497-e0d9-467f-a7c2-1bd6986edd31.PDF"]}}

name: read_webpage
content: Successful tool call result 1 with tool read_webpage: {"success": true, "data": {"content": "紫光国芯微电子股份有限公司（002049，紫光国微；可转债127038“国微转债”）筹划重大资产重组：拟以发行股份及支付现金方式，购买南昌建恩、北京广盟、天津瑞芯等交易对方持有的瑞能半导体科技股份有限公司控股权或全部股权，并募集配套资金，构成关联交易。因事项存在不确定性，为维护投资者利益并避免股价异常波动，公司股票自2025年12月30日开市起停牌；“国微转债”自同日起停牌并暂停转股，预计停牌不超过10个交易日。截止公告日（2026年1月7日），公司正与各方推进交易工作、协商方案并编制交易预案，相关事项未确定，证券继续停牌；后续将按进展及时披露并在事项确定后申请复牌，提示交易存在不确定性及投资风险。", "url": "http://static.cninfo.com.cn/finalpage/2026-01-08/1224922637.PDF"}}

name: read_webpage
content: Successful tool call result 0 with tool read_webpage: {"success": true, "data": {"content": "紫光国芯微电子股份有限公司（002049，紫光国微；可转债：127038，国微转债）筹划“发行股份+支付现金”购买资产并募集配套资金的关联交易。公司股票自2025/12/30开市起停牌；国微转债自同日起停牌并暂停转股，预计不超10个交易日，并已披露停牌进展（2026/1/8）。2026/1/13董事会（八届三十六次）审议通过本次交易预案等议案，相关公告于2026/1/15披露。经申请，公司股票及国微转债于2026/1/15开市起复牌。当前审计、评估未完成，暂不召开股东会；待完成后将再开董事会并依法召集股东会审议。风险：交易仍需内部审议、深交所审核及证监会注册，并需标的公司瑞能半导体完成全国股转系统摘牌并变更为有限责任公司后方可实施，审批及时间存在不确定性。公司将持续推进并按规披露。", "url": "https://file.finance.qq.com/finance/hs/pdf/2026/01/15/1224934010.PDF"}}

name: google_search
content: Successful tool call result 1 with tool google_search: {"success": true, "data": {"summary": "* 紫光国微因法院裁定受理公司重整，其股票交易将被实施退市风险警示（*ST），相关公告编号为2024-087（Source: http://static.cninfo.com.cn/finalpage/2026-02-28/1224989297.PDF）；该风险警示情形亦在2024年11月25日公告中被提及，依据《深圳证券交易所股票上市规则》（Source: https://static.cninfo.com.cn/finalpage/2024-11-25/1221836386.PDF）。  \n* 公告明确，若公司存在退市风险警示情形，股票简称将冠以“*ST”字样并进入风险警示板交易（Source: http://dataclouds.cninfo.com.cn/shgonggao/2025/2025-04-30/89888804250911f09b38fa163e957f7a.pdf）。  \n* 无搜索结果提及紫光国微被实施“ST”（非退市风险警示）情形，仅涉及“*ST”（退市风险警示）；部分结果提及“ST”为其他公司情形，与紫光国微无关（Source: http://static.cninfo.com.cn/finalpage/2025-08-29/1224615301.PDF）。", "urls": ["http://static.cninfo.com.cn/finalpage/2026-02-28/1224989297.PDF", "http://static.cninfo.com.cn/finalpage/2025-12-19/1224886428.PDF", "http://dataclouds.cninfo.com.cn/shgonggao/2025/2025-04-30/89888804250911f09b38fa163e957f7a.pdf", "http://static.cninfo.com.cn/finalpage/2025-03-25/1222882059.PDF", "http://static.cninfo.com.cn/finalpage/2021-10-30/1211447846.PDF", "http://static.cninfo.com.cn/finalpage/2025-08-29/1224611456.PDF", "https://static.cninfo.com.cn/finalpage/2024-11-25/1221836386.PDF", "http://static.cninfo.com.cn/finalpage/2025-08-29/1224615301.PDF", "http://dataclouds.cninfo.com.cn/shgonggao/2025/2025-08-01/c86f77476de411f0b044fa163e957f7a.pdf", "http://dataclouds.cninfo.com.cn/shgonggao/2025/2025-04-30/1be1e9d7250611f0be0dfa163e957f7a.pdf"]}}

name: read_webpage
content: Successful tool call result 0 with tool read_webpage: {"success": true, "data": {"content": "仁东控股(*ST仁东，002647)披露2025年报（171页）。公司聚焦第三方支付，核心主体合利宝持央行《支付业务许可证》（储值账户运营Ⅰ类、支付交易处理Ⅰ类）及跨境人民币支付备案，香港子公司持MSO牌照；原租赁、保理、小贷等业务已退出/剥离。2025年重整自受理到执行完毕≤3个月，化解历史债务、优化资产负债结构并引入中信资本、广州资产、招商平安资管等投资人；按重整计划拍卖处置低效资产/子公司股权（民盛租赁70%、广州仁东信息100%等），租赁业务于2025/6/5交割后剥离。支付牌照续展因间接控股股东进入重整被央行中止审查，业务正常，正推进续展。重点发力跨境支付并谋划“支付+AI”第二增长曲线，新设多家智算/数域子公司并投资江原科技。  \n财务：营收8.23亿元，同比-29.01%；归母净利3.60亿元（上年-8.33亿元），扣非0.43亿元；经营现金流净额0.60亿元。总资产55.06亿元（+20.14%），归母净资产5.62亿元（上年-7.05亿元）。非经常性损益净额3.17亿元，主要为债务重组收益5.43亿元、处置子公司股权亏损1.57亿元及行政处罚罚没款计入营业外支出0.75亿元。2025末货币资金44.10亿元，占资产80%，其中客户备付金等受限41.40亿元。全年不分红；母公司未分配利润-17.86亿元、合并-13.23亿元。主要风险：牌照续展、商誉减值、监管变化、竞争与技术、客户违规、涉诉担保及投资者索赔等。", "url": "http://static.cninfo.com.cn/finalpage/2026-02-28/1224989297.PDF"}}
